{{Infobox character
| name = Dalton Foster
| aliases = Foster, Dalton
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Reader’s senses|Reader's senses]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, [[Awakening]], floating tools to manipulate gems and silver}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|gunner}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, one of the greatest gunsmiths in the Empire's history}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Testament]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|, Calder's crew}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, Navigator crew}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|gunner, gunsmith, crew member, crewmember}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|gunsmith up the hill}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, cabin on The Testament}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Dalton Foster Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Dalton Foster is a renowned gunsmith and the gunner for Captain [[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s ship, [[The Testament]]. Recognized as a world-class craftsman, his custom firearms are highly prized status symbols among the elite of the Empire. He is a [[Soulbound]], a rare individual capable of [[binding]] himself to his tools; he can manifest floating implements such as hammers, chisels, and tongs by tapping into his [[Soulbound Vessel]]. This ability allows him to create specialized weapons, though it has come at a significant personal cost involving the loss of his family members. A grizzled man with untamed gray hair and a habit of wearing two pairs of spectacles, Foster is characterized by his gruff demeanor and frequent scowling. Despite his rough exterior and tendency to grumble, he is a loyal crew member who has significantly upgraded the ship's armory. He possesses deep knowledge of the world and has previously lived in the Capital, though he often attempts to keep his past a secret.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Dalton Foster, an old gunner who sometimes uses the alias [[Duster]], serves as the gunner for [[Calder]] aboard [[The Testament]]. A former gunsmith and original pistol maker who lived a hermit-like existence, he was once an admired figure to [[Calder]]'s gunner. During his travels, he visited the [[Blackwatch]] main base alongside Andel and [[Petal]], often utilizing both reading-glasses and shooting-glasses for tasks such as inspecting musket barrels or taking meeting notes. While performing various duties ranging from manning the ship's wheel to watching from the crow's nest, he encouraged [[Calder]] to utilize the crown's power against the [[Consultants]]. While accompanying [[Calder]] and Andel through a forest, Foster ultimately shot the [[Child of Nakothi]] in its head.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] is the gunner on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is at the gunsmith up the hill.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] is [[Calder]]'s gunner.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster was once a gunsmith and is somewhat of a hermit.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] was an original maker of certain pistols.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] is a person once admired by [[Calder]]'s gunner.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is a character associated with a cannon.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster has a tendency to shoot people who wake him up in the middle of the night.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster mans the wheel of the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] is an old gunner who uses the false name [[Duster]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is a character who visited the main base of the [[Blackwatch]] with Andel and [[Petal]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster fired his musket.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster inspects a musket barrel through reading-glasses.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is a character located in the crow's nest clutching muskets.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is a person [[Calder]] thinks might be able to help.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is a crewmember who wears shooting-glasses and reading-glasses.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] is a crew member tasked with taking notes during meetings.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster uses shooting-glasses and reading-glasses.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is a character present in the room with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster encouraged [[Calder]] to use the crown's power on the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is present in the hallway with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster was following [[Calder]] through the forest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is with [[Calder]] and Andel.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] is a character who asks what happened.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster shot the [[Child of Nakothi]] in its tiny head.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is a person [[Calder]] compares himself to.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Foster is a gunner.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dalton Foster]] was at the wheel of the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Dalton Foster]] is a gunner and a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Dalton Foster]] is a grizzled old man and one of the greatest gunsmiths in the Empire's history.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|As a member of [[Calder]]'s crew and a passenger on [[The Testament]], Dalton Foster serves as the ship's Reader. He utilizes his heightened Reader's senses and knowledge of alchemy to assist the crew, even participating in a test of the [[Optasia]] alongside [[Calder]] and Andel. Foster has upgraded the ship's armory and maintains his readiness by testing his weapons twice a day, including the use of a pistol. Despite having no remaining family, he remains an active part of the crew's operations and is capable of firing upon the [[Regent]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is a character on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is a passenger on [[The Testament]] who was tinkering with a cannon.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is a member of [[Calder]]'s crew.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is with [[Calder]] and Andel to test the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is poisoned.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is a passenger on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Dalton Foster]] is a member of [[Calder]]'s crew and has upgraded the ship's armory.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is unlikely to raise a real objection to [[Jerri]] joining the crew.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster knows about alchemy.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is present during the conversation.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is capable of firing on the [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster tests his weapons twice a day.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster is a Reader on the crew.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster mocks [[Calder]]'s abilities.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster uses a pistol.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Dalton Foster]]'s family (former wife and children) are gone.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Foster has Reader's senses.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c23" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Dalton Foster]]'s intent is described as irritation, focus, and mild frustration.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|As a gunsmith and member of a [[Navigator]] crew, Dalton Foster serves aboard [[The Testament]] where he maintains the ship's firearms and occupies his own cabin. Utilizing a toolbelt that functions as his [[Soulbound Vessel]], he employs floating tools to manipulate silver and gems for his various projects. During the ship's operations, he has been seen shouting from within a cannon and managing long guns while wearing shooting-glasses. After passing out following an instance of cheating with [[Awakening]], he later oversaw the transport of citizens to a guarded checkpoint. In combat, Foster has utilized a sharpened fire poker and his [[Awakened gun]], [[Oath to Eternity]], while standing on the ship's ramp or near [[Calder]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster's toolbelt is his [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster is a crew member on [[The Testament]] responsible for the guns.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster is a crew member who supports the group with long guns.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c12">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster shouted with his head halfway up a cannon.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster is someone who can make guns.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Dalton Foster]] is a man who has a cabin on [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Dalton Foster]] sent [[Lotta]] to find Andel.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster announced that the Captain had an emergency signal for the crew.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Dalton is addressed by Andel.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster uses floating tools to manipulate gems and silver.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Dalton Foster]] is a man who uses a [[Soulbound Vessel]] to work on projects.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Dalton Foster]] is a gunsmith.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Dalton Foster]] is a member of a [[Navigator]] crew.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster cheated with [[Awakening]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster passed out.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster explained that [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s armor kept [[Petal]] from dying.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster is in charge of driving citizens to a guarded checkpoint.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster spoke to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster is a crew member who holds a matchstick.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster is on the ramp of [[The Testament]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster stands behind a cannon wearing shooting-glasses.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster is a character who clapped [[Calder]] on the shoulder.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster is standing on the left of [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster uses a sharpened fire poker as a weapon.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster was holding a smoking gun.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster looked through the broken railing at what was in the sea.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster uses an [[Awakened gun]] named [[Oath to Eternity]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster uses shooting-glasses and a musket.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Foster has a wooden peg leg.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“My gunner, don’t worry about him. He doesn’t care where we go.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Duster,” he said pointedly. Foster had a history of forgetting his false name.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“What just happened?” Foster asked, his voice shaken.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Ready cannons.” “READY CANNONS!” Calder paused for a moment, giving Foster time to comply.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“I think Foster’s poisoned,” he responded.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
